---
title: "Talks"
---

## Talks

::: {.talk-entry}
::: {.talk-date}
2025
:::
::: {.talk-main}
**Conference on Extreme Value Analysis**, Chapel Hill, USA

Central limit theory for Peaks-over-Threshold partial sums of long memory linear time series

[Website](https://eva2025.unc.edu/){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-dark target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
[Slides](slides/eva2025.pdf){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::
:::

::: {.talk-entry}
::: {.talk-date}
2025
:::
::: {.talk-main}
**German Probability and Statistics Days**, Dresden, Germany

CLT for PoT-estimators in long memory linear time series

[Slides](slides/scheffel_gpsd_2025.pdf){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::
:::

::: {.talk-entry}
::: {.talk-date}
2025
:::
::: {.talk-main}
**ECOSTA**, online

Extending Brown-Resnick stationarity to the max-domain of attraction

[Website](https://www.cmstatistics.org/EcoSta2025/index.php){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-dark target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
[Slides](slides/ecosta2025.pdf){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::
:::

::: {.talk-entry}
::: {.talk-date}
2023
:::
::: {.talk-main}
**CMStatistics**, Berlin, Germany

Long range dependence in extreme value analysis

[Website](https://www.cmstatistics.org/CMStatistics2023/index.php){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-dark target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
[Slides](slides/cmstatistics2023.pdf){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::
:::
